calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-11-2015 Continued To Jun-15-15 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for Entry of Judgment.
Department 514, Judge: Charles Crompton, Clerk: J. Murphy, Court Reporter: Mitch Lyon, CSR #6840

Ronald Losch, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff AFI Investment Inc., Assignee of IXC Holdings, Inc.
No appearance on behalf or by Worthington Energy Inc.
Theresa Zabit sworn and examined on behalf of Plaintiff AFI Investment Inc., Assignee of IXC Holdings, Inc.
After evidence, Court ordered the following Judgment entered in favor of Plaintiff AFI Investment Inc., Assignee of IXC Holdings, Inc.and against Defendant Worthington Energy Inc. as follows:
Principal $35,385.84
Pre-Judgment Interest $3,751.97
Attorney's Fees $2875.00
Costs $450.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $42,462.81
Judgment signed in open court.

Off Calendar Jun-15-2015 Assigned To Trial Court

Off Calendar Apr-03-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: Atty. KYLE J. WALDIE of Emilio Law Group, APC, Tel No. (714) 379-6239 appearing telephonically for the moving party;
No other appearances made in this matter.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Attorney Kyle J. Waldie, Emilio Law Group, APC's Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Worthington Energy, Inc. is granted. The trial date is continued to June 15, 2015, to allow defendant to obtain new counsel and a certificate of reviver. Counsel to give notice to all parties including his client. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
